since_last: 62% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.64%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 62% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.44% · BTC -0.27% · Gold -1.23% · Nasdaq100 -3.29%. 62% of 86 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.64%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.64%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -0.20%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +4.07%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +4.07%, LSCC +3.35%, ARM +3.22%, QCOM +2.14%, OKLO +2.12%. Laggards: SAP -1.98%, BABA -1.13%, PLTR -1.06%, BIDU -0.80%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.07% at $156.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.07% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
